mapper.select: SELECT id, name, subtitle, bio, focus_json, avatar_url FROM profile WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profile (id, name, subtitle, bio, focus_json, avatar_url) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{bio}, #{focusJson}, #{avatarUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE profile SET name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, bio = #{bio}, focus_json = #{focusJson}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
